calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-12-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Jerome M. Yalon, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Discover Bank.
No appearance by defendant Ada Rotan.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on December 29, 2009.
Declaration of Robert Adkins in Lieu of Personal Testimony at Trial was filed on March 16, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Discover Bank, and against defendant Ada Rotan as follows:

Principal - $6,088.43.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $320.00.

Total - $6,408.43.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-12-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2009 Set For Trial On Apr-12-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
